calibration_run.notes: Single-reviewer example is insufficient for agreement calibration but useful for normalization validation.

decision_mapping.baseline_better: Baseline is clearer, safer, or more proportionate.
decision_mapping.perceptual_better: Perceptual narrative improves specificity without unsafe overreach.
decision_mapping.mixed: Perceptual narrative helps and harms in the same case.
decision_mapping.unsafe_overreach: Perceptual narrative introduces unsupported interpretation or unsafe inference.

case_identity_rules: Use brand_id as stable case key.
Do not merge cases across source artifacts without matching brand_id.
notes_rules: Treat notes as reviewer evidence, not brand facts.
Use notes to tag overreach modes only when explicit.
overreach_tagging_rules: Map authority/trust/leadership concerns to invented_intentionality when intent is implied.
Map wellness outcome concerns to unsupported_emotional_projection.
Map generic prestige language to false_sophistication_language or generic_premium_projection.
safe_zone_tagging_rules: Safe augmentation requires no unsafe veto.
Safe augmentation requires at least medium reviewer confidence.
Perceptual preference alone is not enough to mark a safe zone.
draft_handling: Do not import into production storage.

agreement_levels.strong_agreement: At least 75% of reviewed votes select the same non-unsafe decision.
agreement_levels.moderate_agreement: More than 50% of reviewed votes select the same non-unsafe decision.
agreement_levels.unsafe_veto: At least one reviewed vote selects unsafe_overreach.

disagreement_patterns.definition: Only one reviewer is present, so agreement cannot be calibrated.
disagreement_patterns.calibration_action: Collect at least one additional independent review.

case_confidence_rules: Single-reviewer cases are insufficient for high confidence.
Unsafe overreach produces low confidence for deployment even if specificity improves.
Mixed decisions require reviewer notes before action.
aggregate_confidence_rules: Do not generalize from fewer than six reviewed pairs.
Do not generalize from one reviewer.
Treat trend-level confidence as separate from case-level confidence.
overreach_frequency_rules: unsafe_overreach decisions count as direct overreach detections.
mixed decisions count as partial overreach only when notes identify a failure mode.
feels_brand3_consistency_rules: High consistency requires evidence-bound specificity in notes.
Low consistency applies when reviewers describe the prose as stylized, generic, or unsupported.

reviewer_votes.notes: Guided movement and claim/signal gap are more useful than generic SaaS praise.

calibration_signals.notes_summary: Reviewer preferred perceptual version for evidence-bound specificity.

safe_augmentation_zones: generic SaaS with explicit claim/signal gap and no unsafe reviewer veto
aggregate_calibration.calibration_recommendation: Use only as normalization example; collect multi-reviewer data before calibration decisions.
